title: viola × funesta
intro: Viola × funesta, also known as the hybrid viola or fragrant pansy, is a cross between the common pansy (Viola x wittrockiana) and the viola or heartsease (Viola x modesta). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of flavonoids and anthocyanins, which have been shown to possess antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Consuming Viola × funesta has been associated with several health benefits, including improved cardiovascular health, reduced inflammation, and enhanced immune function. In herbal medicine, the plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried extract, and is often used to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
